summary: Added the '/sweeploop' workflow for iterative code cleaning. It runs a loop (capped at 10 iterations) that sweeps the target, classifies findings as Actionable/Debt/Accepted, implements all actionable findings without user approval, verifies with Go toolchain (vet, test, build), and repeats until zero actionable findings remain. The workflow includes explicit iteration tracking and produces a final clean sweep report. This was later consolidated into the '/personas' workflow's iteration loop.
